shell.title: Settings
shell.empty: No settings available for your role.

common.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this section?

churn_warning_threshold.label: Churn warning threshold
churn_warning_threshold.description: Churn percentage at which a warning is shown

avg_candidates_window.label: Average calculation window
avg_candidates_window.description: Number of months used for the moving average

response_rate_target.label: Response rate target
response_rate_target.description: Target value for candidate response to messages

candidateCustomFields.title: Custom fields
candidateCustomFields.subtitle: Define extra fields available on all candidates. Values are stored per candidate.
candidateCustomFields.label: Label
candidateCustomFields.optionsHint: Comma-separated. Existing values are preserved when you change the options.

driverLicenseSettings.title: Driving licences
driverLicenseSettings.subtitle: Manage the licence categories candidates can pick as a preference.

candidateDisplay.title: Table display
candidateDisplay.subtitle: Per column: coloured labels or plain text. The KPI charts always keep their colours.

candidate_avatar_colored_by_gender.label: Name avatar per gender
candidate_avatar_colored_by_gender.description: On = the avatar next to the candidate name is coloured per gender. Off = one calm grey.

candidate_table_color_owner.label: Owner colour
candidate_table_color_owner.description: On = the owner avatar uses the recruiter's colour. Off = neutral grey.

applicationDisplay.title: Table display
applicationDisplay.subtitle: Per column: coloured labels or plain text. The KPI charts always keep their colours.

application_table_color_owner.label: Owner colour
application_table_color_owner.description: On = the owner avatar uses the recruiter's colour. Off = neutral grey.

display.title: Display settings
display.subtitle: Limits and defaults for tables and charts

candidates_per_page.label: Candidates per API call
candidates_per_page.description: Maximum number of candidates fetched at once

top_cities_n.label: Top N cities
top_cities_n.description: Number of cities shown in the cities chart

shifts_detail_limit.label: Shifts detail limit
shifts_detail_limit.description: Maximum number of shifts in the detail overview

activity_log_limit.label: Audit log entries
activity_log_limit.description: Maximum number of audit log entries fetched

brand.title: Brand
brand.subtitle: Logo, name and primary colour for this platform
brand.companyNameHint: Shown in the navigation bar and emails
brand.primaryColorHint: Used for buttons, links and active menu items
brand.logoHint: PNG or SVG, max 2 MB — shown in the navigation bar

company.title: Company
company.subtitle: Manage your company details and preferences.
company.managedUnder: Company name and logo are managed under General → Brand.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage all your offices and locations in one place.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Store notes and context available across the whole system.
memory.placeholder: Add notes, context or instructions here…

phases.title: Phases
phases.subtitle: Manage your workflow phases and which actions are available in each.

candidateStatus.title: Candidate status
candidateStatus.subtitle: Manage your candidate statuses and their availability.

poolsSettings.title: Talent pools
poolsSettings.subtitle: Manage pools with a name and colour — for candidate lists.

lookups.title: Candidate lookups
lookups.subtitle: Manage the contract types, funnel stages and statuses (labels, colours and order).
lookups.valueHint: Stable key; leave empty to generate one from the label.
lookups.valueImmutable: The slug cannot be changed after creation.
lookups.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? If it is in use it will be archived.
lookups.isApplicantHint: Candidates with this status show the application funnel. Usually one status (e.g. "Applicant").

candidate_types.title: Contract types
candidate_types.subtitle: Multiple per candidate (e.g. On-call, Freelance, Payroll).

funnel_types.title: Funnel stages
funnel_types.subtitle: One per candidate (Prospect → Intake → Pool → Alumni).

statuses.title: Status
statuses.subtitle: Can I deploy them now? (Available, Placed, Unavailable, Sick, Leave).

lookups.requiresAppointmentHint: This stage expects a planned appointment (intake). A missing one is flagged on the candidate.
lookups.isMatchHint: Reaching this stage turns the application into a match (the Matched bucket).
lookups.isRejectedHint: Applications in this stage count as rejected (the Rejected bucket).
lookups.requiresReasonHint: Setting this status requires the user to give a reason (e.g. Inactive).
lookups.requiresMatchHint: This status may only be set with a linked Match (e.g. Placed).
lookups.expectsReturnDateHint: Asks for an "available again from" date (e.g. Unavailable/Sick).

vacancy.title: Statuses
vacancy.subtitle: Manage the statuses of your vacancies.
vacancy.customFieldsHint: Set field names that appear on every vacancy to make custom fields easier to fill.
vacancy.phasesSubtitle: Manage the phases of your vacancies.
vacancy.employmentSubtitle: Manage the employment types your vacancies can use.
vacancy.senioritySubtitle: Manage the seniority levels for your vacancies.
vacancy.educationSubtitle: Manage the education levels for your vacancies.
vacancy.channelsSubtitle: Manage the job boards you can publish vacancies on.
vacancy.appDefaultsSubtitle: The default a new vacancy inherits. Override it per vacancy in the drawer.

tasks.statusSubtitle: Manage the columns of your task board (status + colour).
tasks.typeSubtitle: Manage the activity types (task, call, email…).
tasks.prioritySubtitle: Manage the priorities of your tasks (low, normal, high).

taskDisplay.title: Table display
taskDisplay.subtitle: Per column: coloured labels or plain text. The task board keeps its colours regardless.

rejection.title: Rejection reasons
rejection.subtitle: Manage the reasons for rejecting applications.
rejection.channelSubtitle: The default channel and the message sent per reason.

assessment.title: Assessment criteria
assessment.subtitle: Reusable scoring-criteria groups Koios AI uses to assess candidates. Link a group to a vacancy and override per vacancy.
assessment.hardHint: A hard criterion may trigger AI auto-rejection.
assessment.inUse: In use — linked to a vacancy.

matching.title: Matching strictness
matching.subtitle: How critical the AI matcher is when scoring candidates against your vacancies. Stricter settings produce lower, harder-earned match scores.
matching.perVacancyHint: What matters per vacancy (qualifications, location, …) is set on the vacancy itself.

cvTemplate.title: CV template
cvTemplate.subtitle: Configure the CV design generated from candidate profiles.
cvTemplate.accentColorsHint: Colour 1 = sidebar & bar. Colour 2 = section titles & links.
cvTemplate.sectionsHint: Set which sections are visible and in what order.

security.statusOn: Enabled — your account has extra protection
security.statusOff: Disabled — add an extra layer of security
security.enabledDesc: Save your recovery codes. They can be used only once and will not be shown again.
security.scanDesc: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Bitwarden, etc.) and scan the QR code below.
security.disableDesc: Enter your current verification code to disable 2FA.

email.title: Email settings
email.subtitle: Sender address and connection for the email module
email.gmailDesc: Connect via OAuth2 or app password
email.officeDesc: Connect via Microsoft OAuth2 or SMTP
email.manualDesc: Your own mail server or provider
email.oauthWarning: OAuth2 connection for {{provider}} must be configured via the backend. Save the sender address below; the actual OAuth connection is set up by the administrator.
email.passwordKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password

klanten.title: Clients
klanten.subtitle: Email connection and signature for client communication and reminders.

kandidaten.title: Candidates
kandidaten.subtitle: Email connection and signature for candidate communication and reminders.

planning.title: Planning
planning.subtitle: Email connection and signature for planning emails.

email.signatureHint: Added to the bottom of every email of this type.

appStore.title: App store
appStore.desc: Manage and install apps and integrations.

sollicitaties.title: Applications
sollicitaties.desc: Notifications about new and updated applications.

vacatures.title: Vacancies
vacatures.desc: Notifications about vacancy updates and status changes.

facturering.title: Billing
facturering.desc: Notifications about invoices, payments and subscriptions.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.secretOnce: Copy the secret now — it will not be shown again.
apiKeys.allowedIpsHint: Optional. Leave empty for no IP restriction. IPv4/IPv6 or CIDR (e.g. 192.168.0.0/24).

access.subtitle: Set per resource whether this key has access and at what level.

incoming.title: Incoming webhooks
incoming.subtitle: Create incoming webhook URLs to trigger workflows from external systems.

outgoing.title: Outgoing webhooks
outgoing.subtitle: Push events to an external endpoint and choose per webhook which events to subscribe to.
outgoing.secretOnce: Copy the signing secret now — it will not be shown again.
outgoing.signingHint: Use this secret to verify the X-Koios-Signature (HMAC-SHA256).

sync.title: Synchronisation
sync.subtitle: Manually fetch data · max once per {{secs}}s per item
sync.noPermission: You do not have permission to synchronise

candidates.label: Candidates
candidates.desc: Candidate data from the planning system

locations.label: Locations
locations.desc: Locations are synced together with customers

departments.label: Departments
departments.desc: Departments are synced together with customers

orders.label: Orders
orders.desc: Orders overview from the planning system

shifts.label: Shifts
shifts.desc: Shift details from the planning system

import.title: Import {{type}}
import.subtitle: Import your existing {{type}} data with a CSV file.
import.fileSelected: File selected. Click Next to map the columns.
import.mapColumns: Map the columns from your CSV to the system fields.
import.mapColumnsHint: Column mapping is configured after upload.

apps.notOnPkg3Title: Tenant is not on Package 3 yet
apps.notOnPkg3Desc: You can pre-configure connectors, but they only become visible to users after you upgrade this tenant package to Package 3 via the Modules tab.
apps.costDesc: Enabling or disabling apps directly affects your invoice. Contact your account manager for pricing.
apps.adminOnly: Only admins can enable or disable apps.

modules.superAdminDesc: Changing the package directly affects the customer invoice. Every change is logged.
modules.connectorsHint: Connectors (ShiftManager, HelloFlex, Elanza…) are managed per client under Integrations → Apps. Enabling them costs money and unlocks the workflow templates.

tierDesc.pro: + Koios AI + AI Agents + Workflows + WhatsApp Business
tierDesc.enterprise: + REST API + personal WhatsApp + Insights+ + Connectors + SLA

modules.emptyDesc: Settings for this module are coming.
modules.smKpiDesc: Separate KPI targets for the Shiftmanager dashboard (distinct from the main Dashboard KPIs). Configuration coming.

whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: No WhatsApp Business connection is configured for this tenant yet.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Click a role to edit its permissions
roles.deleteBlocked_one: Cannot delete — {{count}} user has this role. Assign them another role first.
roles.deleteBlocked_other: Cannot delete — {{count}} users have this role. Assign them another role first.

languageSettings.languagesSubtitle: The languages you can pick on candidates.
languageSettings.levelsSubtitle: Proficiency levels (e.g. Poor → Very good, Native).

availabilitySettings.title: Availability
availabilitySettings.subtitle: Manage the availability options — a separate axis next to status.

industrySettings.title: Industries
industrySettings.subtitle: Manage the industries selectable in your company profile.

genderSettings.title: Gender
genderSettings.subtitle: Genders with a colour — drives the candidate icon colour.

shiftTypes.title: Shift types
shiftTypes.desc: Manage shift kinds, times and colours.

availability.title: Availability
availability.desc: Rules for candidate availability and rest periods.

automatch.title: Auto-match rules
automatch.desc: Configure how candidates are automatically matched to shifts.

board.title: Planning board
board.desc: Columns and default layout of the planning board.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.subtitle: Limits, costs and retention for your messaging traffic.

limits.subtitle: Set the messaging limit. The ceiling is set by us and cannot be exceeded.
limits.label: Messaging limit

costs.subtitle: Usage and costs for this period.

retention.subtitle: How long messages are kept. The effective period is the lowest of the two.

sm_open_shifts_warning.label: Open shifts warning
sm_open_shifts_warning.description: Number of open shifts that triggers a warning

sm_no_show_threshold.label: No-show threshold
sm_no_show_threshold.description: No-show percentage that triggers a warning

statuses.title: Customer statuses
statuses.subtitle: Manage the statuses a customer can have (Active, Prospect, …).

locationStatuses.title: Location statuses
locationStatuses.subtitle: Manage the statuses a customer location can have.

departmentStatuses.title: Department statuses
departmentStatuses.subtitle: Manage the statuses a department can have.

contactStatuses.title: Contact statuses
contactStatuses.subtitle: Manage the statuses a contact person can have.

documentTypes.title: Document types
documentTypes.subtitle: Categories and colours for candidate documents (CV, ID, diploma, …).

requiredFields.title: Required fields
requiredFields.subtitle: Mark which fields are required per phase. A required field shows a star and blocks saving when empty.

viewConfig.title: {{label}} view
viewConfig.description: Choose which blocks appear on the {{label}} dashboard and in what order.

functionsSettings.title: Functions
functionsSettings.subtitle: Manage the function list and whether recruiters can enter free values.
functionsSettings.freeEntryHint: On: recruiters can type their own function (combobox). Off: pick from the list only (strict dropdown).
functionsSettings.confirmFreeEntry: Are you sure? Free entry lets recruiters type functions that aren’t in the list — this can lower data quality.

customerDisplay.title: Table display
customerDisplay.subtitle: Per column: coloured labels or plain text. The KPI charts always keep their colours.

customer_table_color_owner.label: Owner colour
customer_table_color_owner.description: On = the owner avatar uses the account manager's colour. Off = neutral grey.
